title: scene.createObject request params
description: Request to create a new scene object. parentId, when present, is the parent under which to create the object; absent means create at the scene root. kind is an optional generic, free-form node classification. No engine live-memory references appear in the request.

parentId.description: Optional parent object to create the new object under; absent means the scene root.

kind.description: Optional generic, free-form node classification for the new object.
